# MaxLananas Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of MaxLananas — 16-year-old developer and Minecraft 1:1 builder from Guadeloupe, France.

## About
MaxLananas is a self-taught full-stack developer specializing in kernel development (C, x86 Assembly), Minecraft 1:1 scale building (Builder Council at BuildTheEarth France), civic tech, and open-source projects.

## Key Projects
- **MaxOS**: Operating system kernel from scratch (C, x86 ASM, NASM). GitHub: https://github.com/MaxLananas/MaxOS
- **GwadloupAlert**: Citizen reporting platform for Guadeloupe (JS, Supabase, Leaflet.js). URL: https://gwadloup.onrender.com/
- **PineappleUI**: HTML/CSS to Java Swing transpiler (Java). GitHub: https://github.com/MaxLananas/PineappleUI
- **GwadaBot**: Automated OpenStreetMap import for Guadeloupe (Python, GDAL). GitHub: https://github.com/MaxLananas/gwadabot

## Minecraft Builds
- Fort Napoléon (1:1 Guadeloupe)
- Brutalist Building (conceptual)
- Parisian Building (Haussmannian style)
- Organic Flowers (natural build)
- Wooden House (medieval)
- Circuit Bugatti Le Mans (BTE France, 20+ builders)
- Larressingle medieval city (BTE France, 20+ builders)

## Technologies
C, x86 ASM, NASM, C++, C#, Rust, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Dart, React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Node.js, Flask, FastAPI, Django, Flutter, Electron, Linux, Docker, AWS, Azure, GCP, Cloudflare, Vercel, Netlify, Nginx, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, MySQL, Supabase, Firebase, SQLite, OpenStreetMap, Leaflet.js, GDAL, Figma, Blender, Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Git, GitHub, Postman.

## Commissions
Available for commissions: web development, Java plugins, Minecraft builds, custom tools. Open a ticket on Discord.
